programme.title: PL Retro: Chelsea v Liverpool 2003
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from years gone by in the Premier League. Here, Chelsea and Liverpool meet on the final day of the 2002-03 season, with a top-four place on the line.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '10
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Manchester United meet Liverpool in 2010, with a Dimitar Berbatov hat-trick proving the difference between the two teams.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '14
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Man United host Liverpool in March 2014 in a remarkable contest that saw the visitors awarded three penalties.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '92
programme.desc: Classic action from the Premier League. Here, a memorable meeting of arch rivals Manchester United and Liverpool back in 1992 that saw four goals.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '94
programme.desc: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, arch rivals Liverpool and Manchester United meet at Anfield back in 1994 in a match that saw one of the Premier League's great comebacks.

programme.title: Best Premier League Goals 16/17
programme.desc: Sky Sports takes a look at some of the best goals from Premier League seasons in years gone by. Here, a look at the best goals scored in the 2016-17 campaign.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Merseyside Derby
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best goals scored in seasons gone by in the Premier League. Here, a Merseyside derby special with all the best goals in matches between Liverpool and Everton.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Manchester Derby
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best goals scored in seasons gone by in the Premier League. Here, a Manchester derby special with all the best goals from matches between Man Utd and Man City.

programme.title: PL: Brentford v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Fighting the drop, West Ham head to London rivals Brentford. The Irons remain two points above the Premier League relegation zone, despite a massive win over Everton last weekend. (02.

programme.title: PL: Newcastle Utd v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Drained of confidence, a Newcastle side winless in four entertain one of the Premier League's form teams Brighton, whose pursuit of European football continues at pace. (02.

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Dismantled on home soil last time out, Regis Le Bris' leaky Sunderland visit Championship-bound Wolves. Three points would rekindle hopes of a place in Europe for the Black Cats. (02.

programme.title: SNF: Arsenal v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Back on top, Arsenal look to open up a six-point lead over City - who play Monday - with the Saturday Night Football visit of Fulham, in a fight of their own for a place in Europe. (02.

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Andoni Iraola's European hopefuls Bournemouth host Oliver Glasner's Crystal Palace. The Cherries were denied a third consecutive win late on by Leeds last week. (03.

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: A fierce rivalry renewed with Champions League qualification the aim for both, Manchester United and Liverpool lock horns again on a huge Super Sunday at Old Trafford. (03.

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: FA Cup finalists Chelsea, under caretaker charge of Calum McFarlane, return to Premier League action against Vitor Pereira's Forest, hitting their stride at just the right time. (04.

programme.title: MNF: Everton v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester City's title pursuit continues at the Hill Dickinson Stadium on Monday Night Football against Everton. Guardiola's City still hold a game in hand over leaders Arsenal. (04.

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.sub-title: Carling Cup Final 2012-Cardiff City V Liverpool 26.02 Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the 20212 final at Wembley Stadium. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset.

programme.title: Live WSL
programme.desc: Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion v Arsenal (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the Women's Super League match at Broadfield Stadium in Crawley. These two sides last met in the reverse fixture back in October when Arsenal came out on top with a 1-0 victory at Emirates Stadium. The win was decided by an own goal from Brighton defender Marisa Olislagers who put the ball in the back of her own net in the 15th minute.

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.sub-title: Capital One Cup Final 2013-Bradford City V Swansea City 24.02 Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Swansea City. Highlights of the 2013 final at Wembley Stadium, where the League Two Bantams were aiming to produce yet another cup upset. Swansea were appearing in their first major cup final and beat Chelsea in the semi-finals to reach this stage, but Bradford had stolen most of the headlines in the competition this season, belying their lowly league status to eliminate the likes of Arsenal, Aston Villa and Wigan Athletic.

programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 11 league games (W8 D3), collecting more points (24) and conceding fewer goals (8) than any other side during that run.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost, and failed to score, in each of their last five Premier League games; they haven’t lost six in a row since November 1993, while they’ve never lost six in succession without scoring in their league history.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Spurs ended a 15-game winless run against Wolves last time out (1-0) and could record successive victories in the Premier League for the first time since their opening two matches of this season against Burnley (3-0) and Manchester City (2-0).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool (D9 L7), though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16.

programme.sub-title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Regions Tradition Round 1
programme.desc: The Tradition is an event on the PGA Tour Champions. First staged 36 years ago in 1989, the PGA Tour recognizes the event as one of the five senior major golf championships. It is the only senior major where the winner does not earn an exemption into a PGA Tour or European Tour event.

programme.title: ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic Round 1
programme.desc: The Myrtle Beach Classic, a PGA Tour event sponsored by Visit Myrtle Beach, debuted in 2024 is the first PGA Tour event in Myrtle Beach history, and is the first major professional golf tournament to the Grand Strand in 24 years. It is played at the Dunes Golf and Beach Club in the Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. The event will feature a purse of $3.9 million with 300 FedExCup points awarded to the champion.

programme.title: Formula 1 : Belgian Grand Prix: Race Highlights
programme.desc: The 2017 Belgian Grand Prix, held at Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Lewis Hamilton starts on pole, having tied Michael Schumacher's all-time record of 68 poles in qualifying.
